courseleaf.title: Agricultural & Environmental Sciences, Bachelor of Science, Individual
courseleaf.informationtext:
The Individual Major in this College has been suspended indefinitely.

Program Office

150 Mrak Hall; 530-752-0108; Advising

Student Proposal

An Individual Major may be organized by a student having a specific academic interest not represented by an established major. Each student wishing an Individual Major should submit a proposal to the Dean's Office, prior to reaching 120 units, for review by the Student Actions & Individual Major Subcommittee. This proposal must include: (1) an essay describing the special educational aims of the student, including a statement indicating why the educational objectives cannot be met by existing majors; (2) a list of planned courses; and (3) faculty advisor recommendations. It is critical that students contact a college counselor in the Dean's Office for consultation and development of the proposal.
